mapper.sql: /* OfferMapper.getSelectOffer : 제안 테이블 조회 */ SELECT to2.offer_id AS id ,to2.offer_uid AS offer_uid ,to2.offer_status_code AS offer_status_type ,to2.offer_at AS offer_at ,to2.offer_amount AS price ,to2.offer_position_addr AS offer_location_address ,to2.offer_position_distance AS offer_location_distance ,to2.offer_position_latt AS offer_location_latitude ,to2.offer_position_lngt AS offer_location_longitude ,to2.offer_memo_content AS offer_memo ,to2.create_at AS create_at ,to2.update_at AS update_at FROM tb_offer to2
mapper.select: ORDER BY to2.create_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

/* OfferMapper.selectOfferTreatmentsByOfferId : 제안 시술 목록 조회 */ SELECT ot.offer_treatment_id ,ot.offer_id ,ot.treatment_level ,ot.treatment_code FROM tb_offer_treatment ot WHERE ot.offer_id = #{offerId} AND ot.delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY ot.treatment_level, ot.treatment_code

/* OfferMapper.selectOfferDesignersByOfferId : 제안 디자이너 목록 조회 */ SELECT od.offer_designer_id AS id ,od.offer_id AS offer_id ,od.uid AS uid ,tu.user_nickname AS nickname ,od.offer_agree_status_code AS custom_offer_request_type ,od.create_at AS create_at ,od.update_at AS update_at FROM tb_offer_designer od LEFT JOIN tb_user tu ON tu.uid = od.uid AND tu.delete_yn = 'N' WHERE od.offer_id = #{offerId} AND od.delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY od.create_at
